title: BEM-904 evaluation SLA
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/pilot/evaluation').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/pilot/sla').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

metrics = {
  'status':'active',
  'profile':'synthetic_pilot_evaluation_profile',
  'metrics':[
    {'id':'cycle_time','name':'cycle time reduction','unit':'percent','target_placeholder':'operator_defined'},
    {'id':'manual_actions','name':'manual actions reduction','unit':'count','target_placeholder':'operator_defined'},
    {'id':'defect_rate','name':'defect rate','unit':'count','target_placeholder':'operator_defined'},
    {'id':'traceability','name':'traceability coverage','unit':'percent','target_placeholder':100},
    {'id':'proof_coverage','name':'proof coverage','unit':'percent','target_placeholder':100},
    {'id':'operator_gate_hits','name':'operator gate hits','unit':'count','target_placeholder':'operator_defined'}
  ],
  'operator_gate':'real target thresholds and business priority are strategic choices'
}
Path('governance/pilot/evaluation/synthetic_pilot_evaluation_profile.json').write_text(json.dumps(metrics, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

sla = {
  'status':'template_ready',
  'service_levels':[
    {'id':'sla_traceability','promise':'every task has id, owner, status, proof or blocker'},
    {'id':'sla_no_main_without_pass','promise':'main workspace receives only PASS artifacts'},
    {'id':'sla_operator_gate','promise':'strategic/scope/security/paid-api decisions are gated to operator'},
    {'id':'sla_feedback_loop','promise':'product feedback is routed to rule registry candidate flow'}
  ],
  'real_values_require_operator':True
}
Path('governance/pilot/sla/pilot_sla_template.json').write_text(json.dumps(sla, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

dashboard = {
  'status':'active',
  'health_source':'governance/dashboard/repository_health.json',
  'evaluation_profile':'governance/pilot/evaluation/synthetic_pilot_evaluation_profile.json',
  'sla_template':'governance/pilot/sla/pilot_sla_template.json',
  'readiness':{
    'baseline_ready':Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM889_REPOSITORY_READY.md').exists(),
    'autonomous_sending_ready':Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM899_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY.md').exists(),
    'pilot_scaffold_ready':Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM901_PILOT_READINESS_PASS.md').exists(),
    'bmc_ready':Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM902_BMC_EVALUATOR_PASS.md').exists(),
    'product_onboarding_ready':Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM903_PRODUCT_ONBOARDING_PASS.md').exists()
  }
}
Path('governance/pilot/evaluation/pilot_dashboard.json').write_text(json.dumps(dashboard, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

errors = []
for key, ok in dashboard['readiness'].items():
    if not ok:
        errors.append(key + ' not ready')
if len(metrics['metrics']) < 6:
    errors.append('not enough metrics')
if len(sla['service_levels']) < 4:
    errors.append('not enough SLA items')
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'

tool = '''# BEM-904 pilot evaluation dashboard validator
import json
from pathlib import Path
dashboard = json.loads(Path("governance/pilot/evaluation/pilot_dashboard.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
errors = []
for key, ok in dashboard.get("readiness", {}).items():
    if not ok:
        errors.append(key + " not ready")
profile = json.loads(Path(dashboard["evaluation_profile"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
sla = json.loads(Path(dashboard["sla_template"]).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
if len(profile.get("metrics", [])) < 6:
    errors.append("metrics insufficient")
if len(sla.get("service_levels", [])) < 4:
    errors.append("sla insufficient")
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_pilot_evaluation_dashboard.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM904_EVALUATION_SLA.md').write_text('# BEM-904 Pilot evaluation dashboard and SLA\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nDashboard: governance/pilot/evaluation/pilot_dashboard.json\n\nSLA: governance/pilot/sla/pilot_sla_template.json\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM904_EVALUATION_SLA_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-904 evaluation SLA proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/pilot/evaluation/synthetic_pilot_evaluation_profile.json','governance/pilot/sla/pilot_sla_template.json','governance/pilot/evaluation/pilot_dashboard.json','governance/tools/validate_pilot_evaluation_dashboard.py','governance/reports/BEM904_EVALUATION_SLA.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM904 evaluation SLA ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
